title: Prevention of malaria - Canada.ca
content:
## Prevention of malaria
Learn how malaria can be prevented.
- How can malaria be prevented?
- For more information

## How can malaria be prevented?
There is currently no vaccine for malaria available in Canada, but you can take action to prevent it.

### Take anti-malarial drugs
Consult a health care provider or visit a travel health clinic 6 weeks before you travel. Discuss with your medical professional which anti-malarial is appropriate for you to take for prevention.
Anti-malarial drugs, or "chemoprophylaxis", can be prescribed before your trip. They must be taken before, during and after your travels to help prevent malaria.

### Avoiding mosquito bites
Protect yourself from mosquito bites , particularly from sunset to sunrise.
